name: ecomv2
description: E Commerce using Next Js & Payload CMS connected to Zoho Inventory by n8n

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "payload,frontend" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix payload-backend" "npm run dev --prefix ecomv2-frontend"
scripts.build: concurrently "npm run build --prefix payload-backend" "npm run build --prefix ecomv2-frontend"
